notes: Installing d3dcompiler_43 d3dx9_43 d3dx11_43 with with protontricks or winetricks is required
title: Secret World Legends

notes:
Ez fix ez life.  "env WINEPREFIX=/home/YOURUSERNAME/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx sh winetricks d3dx9_43 d3dx11_43 d3dcompiler_43 vcrun2015".

You'll need to install winetricks and find the location of the game's proton prefix folder yourself if it's different from mine. Also, vcrun2015 may not be necessary according to other reports, but for me the launcher crashed before I installed that manually. Other than that this got the game running almost flawlessly for me. Performance is quite close to that of the native Windows client and I haven't run into any visual artifacts at all.
title: Secret World Legends

notes: Ran WINEPREFIX=/home/[Your Username]/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx winetricks d3dx9_43 and WINEPREFIX=/home/[Your Username]/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx winetricks -q d3dcompiler_43. Launcher loaded and updated, but game crashed on start.
title: Secret World Legends

notes: Ran WINEPREFIX=/home/[YOURUSERNAME]/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx winetricks d3dx9_43 d3dx11_43 d3dcompiler_43. Launcher ran. Received warning about outdated video drivers at game start, started anyway. Stuttering video, weird texture and lighting, crashed before finishing the tutorial.
title: Secret World Legends

notes: Ran WINEPREFIX=/home/[YOURUSERNAME]/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx winetricks d3dx9_43 d3dx11_43 d3dcompiler_43. Launcher ran. Received warning about outdated video drivers at game start, which I ignored. The game had stuttering video with weird texture and lighting. The game crashed before finishing the tutorial. Set option in the game graphics to use DX11. Ran game for 4 hours with only minor problems during cutscenes.

title: Secret World Legends

notes: In the case the launcher dies with a 'failed to start upgrade manager' error: it is a game related bug, it's not Linux. You want to download DirectX End-User Runtimes from 2010 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=8109 and start the exe with "wine ...exe". After that extract the files to a folder and in it start: WINEPREFIX="absolute_path to your_steam_library/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx" wine DXSETUP.exe . Install it and there you go. Make sure in the settings DirectX11 is selected.
title: Secret World Legends

notes:
To get it running, I ran "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx winetricks d3dx9_43 d3dx11_43 d3dcompiler_43 dxvk"

After this, it worked flawlessly, even in dx11 mode. Frame rate was around 50-60 while downloading game data, and it increased to over 75 once downloading was done. Played it for well over two hours straight without a single hitch of any kind.
title: Secret World Legends

notes: Works the same as on Windows after using "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/215280/pfx winetricks d3dx9_43 d3dx11_43 d3dcompiler_43"
title: Secret World Legends
